nodes.title: Use the Sidekick to transform your ideas into prototypes, using the look and feel of your product.

1. Select the prototype
    Choose a quick prompt or write your own
  2. Refine and iterate with AI
  3. Apply to Canvas to edit, share, and continue creating your next big idea
The more details you add to your prompt, the better your results will be.
Transform your space with premium interior design solutions

This luxurious velvet accent chair adds elegance to any living space. Features plush cushioning, sturdy wooden legs, and premium upholstery that's both beautiful and durable.
